nodes.recentposition: Leasing Associate Intern at Essex Property Trust in San Francisco, CA
nodes.bios: Hi! I’m Ryan and I’m a fourth-year Business Economics major, minoring in Management. I initiated in the Fall of 2019 with the Alpha Iota class. In my free time, I enjoy binging Netflix, eating, and hanging out with my dog. A fun fact: I used to compete doing olympic-style archery! Don’t be afraid to say hi at recruitment!
